targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mac_address) AS value FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '20 minutes'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mac_address) AS value FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '20 minutes' AND action = 'ok'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mac_address) AS value FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '20 minutes' AND action = 'alert'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mac_address) AS value FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '20 minutes' AND action = 'quarantine'

SELECT date_trunc('hour', checked_at) AS time, AVG(oscap_score) AS "Snitt-score", MIN(oscap_score) AS "Lägsta score" FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '24 hours' AND oscap_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT ON (mac_address) checked_at AS "Tid", hostname AS "Värdnamn", mac_address AS "MAC", username AS "Användare", nas_ip AS "Switch", action AS "Åtgärd", reason AS "Anledning", oscap_score AS "SCAP-score", high_severity AS "Kritiska brister" FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '20 minutes' AND action != 'ok' ORDER BY mac_address, checked_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (mac_address) hostname AS "Värdnamn", auditd_ok AS "auditd", selinux_ok AS "SELinux", rsyslog_ok AS "rsyslog", oscap_score AS "SCAP-score", report_age_min AS "Rapportålder (min)" FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '20 minutes' ORDER BY mac_address, checked_at DESC

SELECT date_trunc('hour', checked_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE action = 'quarantine') AS "Karantäner", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE action = 'alert') AS "Alerts" FROM compliance_status WHERE checked_at > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
